feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Process Orchestration
feed.subtitle: SAP Process Orchestration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: ECC user is getting locked due to multiple wrong login attempts
entry.content:
Hi,

We are facing an issue where ECC user is getting locked due to multiple wrong login attempts. We recently updated the password for the RFC user, and the same has been updated in all the RFC channels where we are using that username.

We also updated the same password in the NWA RFC destination. However, the user is still getting locked frequently.

Can anyone suggest all the places where we should look and update the new password for the ECC user?

entry.title: IDOC_ERROR_PARSE_FAILURE: Illegal value "" for attribute SEGMENT in <EDI_DC40 SEGMENT="1"> tag withi
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

we have recently migrated to PO from PI 7.4.

In a scenario of FILE to IDOC i am facing below error

""Error before sending due to IDoc parsing error: (7) IDOC_ERROR_PARSE_FAILURE: Illegal value "" for attribute SEGMENT in <EDI_DC40 SEGMENT="1"> tag within IDoc-XML for type <ZVESPRO>:
state=READING_ATTRIBUTE_VALUE, charPosition=98, lineNumber=1, columnNumber=99 ""

 

After my research , I found that SEGMENT field has to be mapped with Constant 1.

I have a question here , In 7.4 Idoc, Segment is mapped to constant "Null"(Blank parameter). and it working fine in production.

Now when coming to 7.5 , while we are trying to push the file , we are facing the error "IDOC_ERROR_PARSE_FAILURE: Illegal value "" for attribute SEGMENT".

IS it mandate to map segment to constant 1 in 7.5 PO ?

Can someone please help me on this. Would be very helpful.

entry.title: FCC not working properly failing with generating empty file - SAP PO
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

There is a scenario where I have structure as below and FCC configured in sender channel mentioned -

<MT_XXX>

<Header> -- Few fields in the header section(details mentioned in sample file)

<Item> -- Few fields in the Item section(details mentioned in sample file)

<MT_XXX>

Error in the channel and even when I tried adding Key field in the structure following the blog mentioned below it is still failing by generating empty file (0 KB). and failing further in mapping stating premature end of file. 

End to End File Content Conversion (FCC) Using IFl... - SAP Community

PFA the csv file which is sample file.

Please suggest where this is going wrong and how can I try to resolve the same.

Thanks,

Nidhi Srivastava

entry.title: How do I edit the timestamp of the SFTP Adapter in SAP PO?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Is there a smart way to customize the SFTP adapter scenario where I can change the standard function Timestamp for the file name from out-kostenstelle-YYYYMMTT-HHmmss.xml to out-kostenstelle-YYYYMMTT.xml? 

We are using PI 7.5 single stack. 

Kind regards,

Miguel

entry.title: What are the ways to connect SAP PO to SQL DB ?
entry.content:
Hi,

The requirement is to send data from SAP ECC to SQL DB. We have the option of connecting to SQL DB via JDBC adapter. But the client is insisting on using HTTPS connectivity. 

How can this be achieved? 

Regards,

LR

entry.title: Import existing BPM source code project NWDS
entry.content:
Hello experts!

I was asked to modify the following existing BPM Process:

All I have been given is a DCs.zip file and inside the zip an directory called _comp with the following file structure inside:

Questions:

  • Is this file structure all I need to modify the existing BPM Process?
  • In which perspective should I import this structure?

I've been reading several posts like this one and to import a BPM Process an SCA file is required (which is not what I have)

Any guidance? Thank you in advance.

entry.title: how to create two outbound cremas idoc if same vendor is extended to two company codes
entry.content:
Hi, 

we want to create idoc based on company code in CREMAS message type if vendor is extended to two company codes then two separate messages should be created. Thanks

#CREMAS #SPLIT CREMAS OUTBOUND

entry.title: No RFC destination found for Sid error for Sender IDOC adapter configured with InboundRA
entry.content:
Hi All,

We had configured InboudRA in NWA month ago and IDOC's were reaching successfully in SAP PO. But now IDOC's are not reaching SAPPO and we are also getting some explanation at channel monitoring as "No rfc destination found for sid XX. will use default rfc destination for metadata read".

Also when we create a new Sender IDOC channel with same inboundRA details then new channel is not showing this explanation/warning message. 

Could you please let us know what is the reason and solution for this error. PFA screenshot for sender channel.

entry.title: Details: com.sap.aii.utilxi.misc.api.BaseRuntimeException; Character reference "&#, BaseRuntimeExce
entry.content:
HI Experts,

 

I do have a Scenario RFC to REST , when data is been pushed from SAP to PO System , i am facing error in PO monitoring 

 

Error :  Details: com.sap.aii.utilxi.misc.api.BaseRuntimeException; Character reference "&#, BaseRuntimeException: Character reference "&#, BaseRuntimeException: Character reference "&#, org.xml.sax.SAXParseException; lineNumber: 1; columnNumber: 201; Character reference "&#

However this the data that sent from SAP for these fields

    "remark": "Tested from Postman",

    "rejectReason": "Not rejected Test Postman"

 

NOTE : Total we have 8 fields, data is in payload is displaying as expected .Only for the above mentioned fields , payload is showing as

 


<REJECTREASON>N�o�t� �r�e�j�e�c�t�e�d� �T�e�s�t� �P�o�s�t�m�a�n</REJECTREASON>
<REMARK>T�e�s�t�e�d� �f�r�o�m� �P�o�s�t�m�a�n</REMARK>

 

 

Can someone please help me on this .

entry.title: IDOC is send from ECC with status 03 but not showing up in SAP PO
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have IDOC being sent from ECC to SAP PO and not able to see it in SAP PO at adapter level nor in message monitoring. IDOC when triggered from ECC showing status code 03(Successful) and we don't see its stuck in SM58 nor in smq1.We don't also see it in SXMB_MONI in ecc. All the configurations like Port, RFC destinations in ECC and in NWA working fine. We were even getting the IDOC message in PO some days back but we don't see it now. But 1 weird thing we observed this time is that Sender IDOC adapter in PO is showing some message like "No rfc destination found for sid XX. will use default rfc destination for metadata read". So we created fresh sender channel and used in our ICO with same inboundRA details and its not showing this message at channel. ping test is getting successful for both cases.

Could you pls help if anything else to be checked apart from above.

1)Screenshot for Sender Channel showing some weird message

2) Created new channel with same inboundRA details which doesn't show this message.

 

 

 

Regards

Mahesh

entry.title: CORS -allow only specific clients -Sender rest adapter
entry.content:
Dear Team,
Greetings of the day!!!

Flow : Source -PI-SAP ECC
Need to authenticate the PO end point using(No auth)

Getting 200 OK If I maintain allow all clients - CORS.

Need to restrict for specific client.(Allow only specific clients).
As shown in image.


While checking with specific URL. getting the socket issue as
Error: tunneling socket could not be established, cause=read ECONNRESET.

Let me know if any information required
Provide me the possible way.
Note:Need to call the PI URL without credentials.
Suggest me how to proceed further .
I followed this link for CORS.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/cors-for-sap-po-rest-sender-adapter/ba-p/13415174

1.certificate based authentication
2. CORS 

Regards,
saikiran kumar.

entry.title: How to retain the original file name in SAP PI/PO in a File to SFTP Scenario.
entry.content:
How can I configure the File and SFTP channels to ensure the original file name remains unchanged during file transfer?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to regenerate the system certificates in sap po 7.5?
entry.content:
Hi Team,
Good day!

We have a SAP standard system certificate expiring on March 17th, in SAP PO Quality and Production.

Please can you provide new certificate to renew it timely for avoiding any disconnections. Kindly provide us the procedure to update the certificates. in SAP PO landscape.

Thanks & Regards
Gopi


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Dynamically extract a field value & then insert it to a field on SOAP Header of async respons
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have requirement that has to be acheived on SAP PO/PI .. this is regarding asynchronous request ans asynch response scenario.. where in the asnych request message we receive "MessageID" field value in SOAP envelope header and there is an asynchronous response where that MessageID value from request message has to be extracted & then insert it to another field "RelatesTo" of asynch response (a field on SOAP Header level).. Could you please guide me to acheive this requirement in SAP PO 7.5 single stack?

Sample asynch request

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="" xmlns:soapenc="" xmlns:xsd="" xmlns:xsi="">
<soapenv:Header xmlns:wsa= xmlns:wsse="">
<wsa:MessageID>f3d02d20e2821edfbaa386b6c489d7de</wsa:MessageID>
<wsa:RelatesTo>f3d02d20e2821edfbaa386b6c489d7de</wsa:RelatesTo>
</soapenv:Header>
<soapenv:Body>
<ns0:cancelRequest>
<ns1:PIwort>
</ns1:PIwort>
</ns1:cancelRequest>

Sample asynch response

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="" xmlns:soapenc="" xmlns:xsd="" xmlns:xsi="">
<soapenv:Header xmlns:wsa="" xmlns:wsse="">
<wsse:Security soapenv:actor="engbus" soapenv:mustUnderstand="1">
</wsse:UsernameToken>
</wsse:Security>
<wsa:From>
</wsa:From>
<wsa:Action>urn:Preisindikation/confirmOrder</wsa:Action>
<wsa:RelatesTo>f3d02d20e2821edfbaa386b6c489d7de</wsa:RelatesTo>
</soapenv:Header>
<soapenv:Body>
<ns0:cancelResponse>
<ns2:Buenummer>08-001</ns2:Buenummer>
</ns1:cancelResponse>

Could you please let me guide me to acheive this requirement?

 

Thanks

Ramu

entry.title: PI issue
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a question regarding SQL DB to S4HANA Integration using JDBC to Proxy scenario in SAP PO/PI .. Here, the Databricks DB guys have shared a very lengthy SQL statement but it is not compatible with SAP PO. should we ask DB guys to build stored procedure on their side?

Is it possible to call stored procedure using JDBC sender adapter from PO?

 

Thanks

Ramu

entry.title: IDOC metadata issue on SAP PO
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have IDOC to proxy interface on SAP PO 7.5 single stack. IDOC structure on sender SAP ECC system got changed i.e, under segment under E1MARAM segment SAP ECC started sending MATNR_LONG instead of MATNR. What should we do from SAP PO side.. should we ask SAP ECC colleauges to share IDOC schema? then import that IDOC schema into SAP PO/PI to make the structure consistent on SAP PO/PI & SAP backend? which format SAP ECC guys should share the IDOC schema XSD or WSDL? what are the options available on their end?

 

Thanks

Ramu

entry.title: Null pointer Exception when using Error handling in rest receiver channel im SAP PO
entry.content:
Hi, 

My scenario is proxy -> synchronous REST.

The REST service I'm calling returns an empty message when the input data is incorrect, including error information in custom headers.

This generates an exception in PO: java.io.IOException: java.io.EOFException

In the error handling tab in the rest receiver channel, when using "Text Content" -> "Result Message is Empty", I still get an EOFException.

The only way to work around this is to use the "Exception" option in "error handling". It should work fine, but when using the "Exception" option in the "Error Handling" tab, we get the following exception in message monitoring:

java.lang.NullPointerException: When trying to invoke the java.lang.CharSequence.toString() method on a null object loaded from the local variable 'replacement'

Any ideas on how to resolve this null pointer exception?

It happens no matter what kind of message I put in "Message Content".

Thanks And regards.

Alex-

entry.title: JDBC Target structure not mapping the source structure fields in the output
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am developing an ODATA to JDBC structure. I have 2 statement nodes in my JDBC target structure, one performs the DELETE operation and other performs INSERT on the same table. However, while mapping the source to target, the JDBC output structure is only populating the Constants mapped to the fields. It isn't populating any of the fields from source structure. Any suggestions on what I could be doing wrong?

Thanks!

entry.title: SAP PO 7.5 SP24 Collapse Under 800MB-1GB Messages & 500QPS - Need Interface-Level Throttling Guidanc
entry.content:
Problem Description:
Our SAP PO system (4-node cluster, 128GB RAM per node, NW 7.5 SP24) recently crashed due to 800MB-1GB payloads combined with 500QPS on specific ICO interfaces. The root cause traces to uncontrolled message volume/size overwhelming the system, despite our "aggressive" global configuration:

 

  • max_message_size = 1GB (yes, I know this is risky 😰)
  • Standard message processing without interface-specific throttling

 

Key Challenges:

 

  1. No Interface-Level Controls: SAP Help/notes (e.g., 2503816, 2761288) only describe global message size/QPS limits. We need per-ICO interface rules (e.g., "Interface X: max 500MB payload, 100QPS").
  2. Scalability Gap: 4 nodes with 128GB RAM should handle large messages, but high concurrency + payloads cause JVM OOMs (heap dumps show 90%+ usage during peaks).
  3. Business Impact: These interfaces process critical EDI/XML files from logistics partners – we can’t reduce payload size or QPS without re-architecting upstream systems.

 

Asking the Community:

 

  • Has anyone implemented interface-specific throttling (QPS/message size) in PO 7.5?
  • Are there hidden configuration parameters or custom BAdIs for ICO-level controls?
  • For large message handling: Any best practices beyond  (e.g., disk-based processing, async queues, chunking)?
  • Could SAP Cloud Integration (CPI) sidecar help offload large messages while keeping PO for legacy logic?

 

System Details:

 

  • NW PO 7.5 SP24 (nwa 7.5 SP24)
  • 4x nodes (VMs: 32vCPU, 128GB RAM, SSD)
  • All ICO interfaces use synchronous processing (due to partner requirements)
  • Message types: XML/EDI (uncompressed, no attachments)

 

Appreciate any insights – we’re currently firefighting with temporary circuit breakers and need a sustainable solution!

entry.title: Messages in HOLDING status SAP PO
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have messages in HOLDING status since long time ago (7 months ago)..

Could you please guide on how to resolve the errors on SAP PO?

Because we cant either resend/delete/cancel these messages from SAP PO app..

Thanks

Ramu
